final_prompt.prompt:
Create an epic fantasy battle scene illustration of a dragon and knight.

Style/medium: needs a "奇幻风格" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Frank Frazetta's heroic fantasy painting tradition, 1980s D&D module cover art, Studio Ghibli's epic sky compositions; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs an epic, dynamic composition — exact framing and energy balance is yours
Subject: must include a dragon breathing fire and a knight charging with shield
Scene/backdrop: must include a burning castle and lightning-filled sky
Lighting/mood: needs an epic, dramatic atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a fiery, dramatic direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
